[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01011000 3
1 00110000 2
2 00110010 3
3 11000000 2
4 00010100 2
5 10101100 4
6 01111001 5
7 01001110 4

01 10 00000000 a
12 21 00000100 1
23 32 00101000 2
34 43 01001000 2
45 54 01001000 2
56 65 00010000 1
67 76 00110000 2 match 1
70 07 00000000 a

02 20 10000000 1
13 31 00010000 1
24 42 00001100 2
35 53 01011000 3 match 0
46 64 00000000 a
57 75 00010000 1
60 06 00000000 a
71 17 00010000 1

03 30 01000000 1
14 41 00000100 1
25 52 00001000 1
36 63 00110000 2 match 1
47 74 00000010 1
50 05 01000000 1
61 16 00010000 1
72 27 00100000 1

04 40 01000000 1
15 51 00010000 1
26 62 00100000 1
37 73 00110000 2 match 1
